shared_governance_thesis: Shared evidence schema, not shared sensitive-data pipeline.

rules.legal_basis: ECOA / Regulation B / CFPB Circular 2022-03 on complex algorithms
rules.data_access: US live path excludes protected attributes before the tool receives data.
rules.output_required: Draft adverse action evidence package with approved reason-code candidates and low-confidence flags.
rules.human_review_trigger: Any REVIEW-PROXY reason or reason confidence below 0.58.
rules.rollback_mechanism: Revert to prior approved reason-code taxonomy and quarantine new mappings.

rules.rule_name: Proxy discrimination and digital redlining signal
rules.legal_basis: ECOA / fair lending risk management / CFPB public guidance on AI credit denials and digital redlining risk
rules.data_access: Uses only non-protected live-path variables and privileged compliance review if demographic analysis is separately approved.
rules.output_required: Internal fair lending review trigger for postcode, thin-file and income-instability concentration.
rules.human_review_trigger: Postcode denial-rate gap above 18 percentage points or thin-file gap above 15 percentage points.
rules.rollback_mechanism: Disable suspect proxy feature in challenger analysis and escalate to model risk committee.

rules.legal_basis: Data minimisation and fair lending control design; internal policy boundary for US live decision governance.
rules.data_access: Hard-drop age, gender_audit, age_band, protected_group_flag and audit_group from US processed file.
rules.human_review_trigger: Any protected audit field appears in US processed output.
rules.rollback_mechanism: Stop pipeline, quarantine file, require four-eyes approval before restart.

rules.legal_basis: EU AI Act Annex III 5(b): creditworthiness or credit score AI systems are high-risk, except fraud detection.
rules.data_access: Live decision path excludes sensitive attributes; governance checklist uses evidence documents, not live scoring data.
rules.output_required: Pre-deployment evidence completeness score and missing evidence list.
rules.human_review_trigger: Completeness below 90 percent or missing human oversight / logging / data governance evidence.
rules.rollback_mechanism: Freeze EU deployment approval until missing evidence is remediated.

rules.legal_basis: EU AI Act requirements for high-risk AI data governance, risk management and human oversight.
rules.data_access: Audit-only sensitive fields may be processed only in segregated environment with lawful basis, logging, access control and retention limits.
rules.output_required: Approval disparity, FNR disparity and FPR disparity by audit group.
rules.human_review_trigger: Approval disparity ratio below 0.80 or group error-rate gap above 8 percentage points.
rules.rollback_mechanism: Suspend new model release and revert to prior approved model version if remediation fails.

rules.legal_basis: EU AI Act post-market monitoring and high-risk AI accuracy / robustness controls.
rules.data_access: Uses production monitoring features and segregated audit comparisons where approved.
rules.output_required: PSI drift score, feature shift summary and required owner.
rules.human_review_trigger: PSI above 0.20 for model score or material shift in protected audit group performance.
rules.rollback_mechanism: Open model governance review and require challenger validation before further rollout.
